subject: Implementation: Response sender (input.go)
description:
Implement user input handlers to send responses back to Claude CLI.

Dependencies: Task 6 complete (response protocol designed), Task 10 complete (event handlers ready)

Files: internal/tui/claude/input.go

Implementation:
1. Add keyboard handlers for prompt responses
2. Implement response message builders
3. Send via m.process.Send() or SendJSON()
4. Handle timeout/cancellation
5. Clear awaiting state after response

Code pattern:
```go
if m.awaitingAskUserQuestion {
    switch msg.String() {
    case "1", "2", "3", "4":
        return m, m.sendUserChoice(parseOption(msg.String()))
    case "esc":
        return m, m.cancelPrompt()
    }
}
```

Deliverable:
- Input handlers for all response types
- Response message builders
- Timeout handling
- Cancellation support

Acceptance:
- [ ] User can respond to prompts via keyboard
- [ ] Responses sent in correct JSON format
- [ ] Claude CLI acknowledges responses
- [ ] Timeout handled gracefully
- [ ] Cancellation works (ESC key)
